ddls:
CREATE TABLE "control_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control code */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of the control code (e.g., RCS, ACPS) */,
  "control_function" TEXT /* Function of the control code (e.g., Raster color control, Specification of operation) */,
  "digital_support" TEXT /* Support for digital format (○: supported, △: partially supported, ×: not supported) */,
  "mobile_support" TEXT /* Support for mobile format (○: supported, △: partially supported, ×: not supported) */,
  "conversion_process" TEXT /* Usage during the conversion process (e.g., Discarded, Used during text layout conversion) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the control code belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the control code is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the control code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the control code was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the control code */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the control code was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_codes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_codes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_codes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES code_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "doc_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., Digital, Mobile) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the document belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_codes" (
  "doc_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document-code relationship */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control code */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., Used, Discarded) */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion log related to this relationship */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the usage of the control code in the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_codes_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES conversion_logs ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_codes_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_codes_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES control_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, quality analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, edit) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the role is associated with */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used to access the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_logs" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being converted */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conversion (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the conversion process */,
  "converted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the conversion */,
  "converted_date" TEXT /* Date the conversion was performed */,
  "conversion_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the conversion process */,
  "conversion_version" TEXT /* Version of the conversion process used */,
  "conversion_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_logs_converted_by FOREIGN KEY ("converted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a control code */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control code */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the control code */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Active, Deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_versions_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES control_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Display, Color) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES code_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document where the code is used */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control code */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the code was used */,
  "usage_context" TEXT /* Context in which the code was used (e.g., Digital, Mobile, Conversion) */,
  "usage_version" TEXT /* Version of the control code used */,
  "converted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the usage */,
  "converted_date" TEXT /* Date the usage occurred */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the usage of the control code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_usage_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES control_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_usage_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
